CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled thisd ay for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joel D. Adler, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Thelen LLP, fka Thelen Reid & Priest LLP.
No appearance by defendants Robert D. Griffin, individually, or Griffin Construction, Inc., a California corporation.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 25, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 25, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Thelen LLP, fka Thelen Reid & Priest LLP, and against the Defaulted Defendants Robert D. Griffin, individually, and Griffin Construction, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $97,710.80.
Prejudgment Interest - $24,420.41.
Attorney's Fees - $2,250.00.
Costs - $440.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $124,821.21.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Nov-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Continued To Sep-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
